title: Experiment Decision
description: Records the outcome of a champion/challenger experiment, including hard gate results, composite ranking score, and the promotion decision. Used by the gate checker service to enforce promotion policy from feedback-loop.md section 6.

experiment_id.description: Unique experiment identifier following the naming pattern exp-{date}-{suite}-{champion}-vs-{challenger}

date.description: Date the experiment was executed, in ISO 8601 date format

suite.description: Eval suite used for this experiment, e.g. core, edge, degeneracy, migration

dataset_version.description: Versioned dataset identifier used for the experiment

champion.description: The current production champion profile and its results

challenger.description: The challenger profile being evaluated against the champion

hard_gates.description: Results of the non-negotiable hard gate checks from feedback-loop.md section 6.1

scores.description: Detailed metric scores for both candidates

rank_score.description: Composite weighted ranking score for the challenger, computed per feedback-loop.md section 5.3

decision.description: Final promotion decision: promote (challenger wins), hold (insufficient evidence), or rollback (challenger regresses)

decided_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the decision was recorded

rationale.description: Optional human-readable explanation for the decision
examples: Challenger passes all hard gates and improves concept adherence by +0.04 with no coherence regression.

ExperimentCandidate.description: Identifies a candidate (champion or challenger) in an experiment

profile_id.description: Steering profile identifier for this candidate

base_model.description: Base model identifier used by this candidate

HardGates.description: Hard gate evaluation results. All gates must pass for a promotion to proceed (feedback-loop.md section 6.1).

passed.description: Whether all hard gates passed. False if any individual gate failed.

degenerate_rate.description: Degeneration rate must be <= 3% on core and migration suites

p95_latency_ms.description: P95 latency must be <= champion p95 latency * 1.20

safety.description: No critical safety regressions. Optional if safety eval not applicable.

GateResult.description: Result of a single hard gate evaluation

value.description: Observed metric value for the challenger

threshold.description: Threshold value used for the gate comparison

ExperimentScores.description: Detailed metric scores from the experiment, combining agent/harness metrics and steering-specific metrics from feedback-loop.md section 5

coherence.description: Coherence score from LLM judge evaluation

concept_adherence.description: Concept adherence score from LLM judge or rubric evaluation

degenerate_rate.description: Fraction of outputs with degeneration (repetition, collapse, incoherence)

language_stability.description: Fraction of outputs with no unintended language drift

solve_rate.description: Average solve rate: expected_steps / wall_clock_seconds, with failures as zero
